subject: refactor(css): replace custom prose styles with @tailwindcss/typography
body:
Install @tailwindcss/typography plugin and delete 16 lines of custom
:deep(.prose) scoped styles from HelpDrawer.vue. The plugin provides
the same heading, paragraph, list, code, and link styling via the
existing prose prose-sm classes — with automatic DaisyUI theme
integration (inherits base-content color, base-200 code backgrounds).

Only one scoped <style> block remains in the codebase: BottomSheet.vue
(Vue transition classes + iOS safe-area — neither has a plugin
equivalent).

Tags: css, cleanup, typography
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: daisyui-migration
Semver: patch
